OnboardingDraft.title: OnboardingDraft
OnboardingDraft.description: Draft progress of a user completing the corporate assessment onboarding form.

profile.description: The partially filled company profile fields.

currentIndex.description: The index of the current step in the multi-step form.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when this draft was last updated.

userId.description: The Firebase Authentication UID who owns this draft.

ApplicationRecord.title: ApplicationRecord
ApplicationRecord.description: Underwriting sheet application and workspace details.

profile.description: The final submitted company profile configuration.

/onboarding_drafts/{userId}.description: Collection of onboarding drafts, segmented by authenticated user UID.

/applications/{userId}.description: Active submitted underwriting loan profile application records keyed by claimant's user UID.
